original_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO < 4) AS t7 INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM (SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO > 7 UNION ALL SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP) AS t11 WHERE DEPTNO < 4) AS t12 ON t7.DEPTNO = t12.DEPTNO;
rewritten_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO < 4) AS t7 INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM (SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO > 7 UNION ALL SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP) AS t11 WHERE DEPTNO < 4) AS t12 ON t7.DEPTNO = t12.DEPTNO

original_query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(EXPR0), 0), T2 FROM (SELECT t5.T2, COUNT(CASE WHEN EMP1.DEPTNO = 0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS EXPR0 FROM EMP AS EMP1, (VALUES (1)) AS t5 (T2) GROUP BY t5.T2 UNION ALL SELECT t8.T2, COUNT(CASE WHEN EMP2.DEPTNO = 0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS EXPR0 FROM EMP AS EMP2, (VALUES (2)) AS t8 (T2) GROUP BY t8.T2) AS t11 GROUP BY T2;
rewritten_query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(EXPR0), 0), T2 FROM (SELECT t5.T2, COUNT(CASE WHEN EMP1.DEPTNO = 0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS EXPR0 FROM EMP AS EMP1, (VALUES (1)) AS t5 (T2) GROUP BY t5.T2 UNION ALL SELECT t8.T2, COUNT(CASE WHEN EMP2.DEPTNO = 0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS EXPR0 FROM EMP AS EMP2, (VALUES (2)) AS t8 (T2) GROUP BY t8.T2) AS t11 GROUP BY T2

original_query: SELECT t4.NAME FROM (SELECT NAME, DEPTNO, DEPTNO - 10 AS DEPTNOMINUS FROM DEPT) AS t4 INNER JOIN (SELECT DEPTNO, SAL + 1 AS f9 FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO, SAL + 1) AS t6 ON t4.DEPTNOMINUS = t6.f9 AND t4.DEPTNO = t6.DEPTNO;
rewritten_query: SELECT DEPT.NAME FROM DEPT INNER JOIN EMP ON DEPT.DEPTNO - 10 = EMP.SAL + 1 AND DEPT.DEPTNO = EMP.DEPTNO

original_query: SELECT t0.JOB, t1.NAME FROM (SELECT EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, HIREDATE, SAL, COMM, DEPTNO, SLACKER, DEPTNO + EMPNO AS f9 FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A') AS t0 LEFT JOIN (SELECT DEPTNO, NAME, DEPTNO + 5 AS f2 FROM DEPT) AS t1 ON t0.JOB = t1.NAME AND t0.f9 = t1.f2 GROUP BY t0.JOB, t1.NAME;
rewritten_query: SELECT t.JOB, t0.NAME FROM (SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A') AS t LEFT JOIN (SELECT DEPTNO, NAME, DEPTNO + 5 AS f2 FROM DEPT) AS t0 ON t.JOB = t0.NAME AND t.DEPTNO + t.EMPNO = t0.f2 GROUP BY t.JOB, t0.NAME

original_query: SELECT CAST(1 AS INTEGER) AS DEPTNO, ENAME FROM (SELECT ENAME FROM (SELECT ENAME, DEPTNO FROM EMPNULLABLES) AS t6 WHERE DEPTNO = 1 UNION ALL SELECT ENAME FROM (SELECT ENAME, DEPTNO FROM EMPNULLABLES) AS t9 WHERE DEPTNO = 1) AS t12;
rewritten_query: SELECT CAST(1 AS INTEGER) AS DEPTNO, ENAME FROM (SELECT ENAME FROM (SELECT ENAME, DEPTNO FROM EMPNULLABLES) AS t6 WHERE DEPTNO = 1 UNION ALL SELECT ENAME FROM (SELECT ENAME, DEPTNO FROM EMPNULLABLES) AS t9 WHERE DEPTNO = 1) AS t12

original_query: SELECT NAME, DDEPTNO, COUNT(*) AS C FROM (SELECT NAME AS NAME, DEPTNO AS DDEPTNO FROM DEPT) AS t3 WHERE NAME = 'Charlie' GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((NAME, DDEPTNO), NAME);
rewritten_query: SELECT NAME, DEPTNO, COUNT(*) AS C FROM DEPT WHERE NAME = 'Charlie' GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((DEPTNO, NAME), NAME)

original_query: SELECT NAME AS NAME, DEPTNO AS DDEPTNO, COUNT(*) AS C FROM DEPT GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((NAME, DEPTNO), NAME) HAVING NAME = 'Charlie';
rewritten_query: SELECT NAME, DDEPTNO, COUNT(*) AS C FROM (SELECT NAME, DEPTNO AS DDEPTNO FROM DEPT) AS t WHERE NAME = 'Charlie' GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((NAME, DDEPTNO), NAME)

original_query: SELECT t5.JOB FROM (SELECT JOB FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A' GROUP BY JOB) AS t5 RIGHT JOIN (SELECT NAME FROM DEPT GROUP BY NAME) AS t6 ON t5.JOB = t6.NAME GROUP BY t5.JOB;
rewritten_query: SELECT t0.JOB FROM (SELECT JOB FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A') AS t0 RIGHT JOIN (SELECT NAME FROM DEPT) AS t1 ON t0.JOB = t1.NAME GROUP BY t0.JOB

original_query: SELECT t2.SAL, t2.EXPR1, t5.EXPR2, t9.EXPR3 FROM (SELECT SAL, SUM(COMM) AS EXPR1 FROM EMP GROUP BY SAL) AS t2 INNER JOIN (SELECT SAL, AVG(COMM) AS EXPR2 FROM (SELECT SAL, COMM FROM EMP GROUP BY SAL, COMM) AS t4 GROUP BY SAL) AS t5 ON t2.SAL IS NOT DISTINCT FROM t5.SAL INNER JOIN (SELECT SAL, SUM(SAL) AS EXPR3 FROM (SELECT SAL FROM EMP GROUP BY SAL) AS t8 GROUP BY SAL) AS t9 ON t2.SAL IS NOT DISTINCT FROM t9.SAL;
rewritten_query: SELECT t2.SAL, t2.EXPR1, t5.EXPR2, t9.EXPR3 FROM (SELECT SAL, SUM(COMM) AS EXPR1 FROM EMP GROUP BY SAL) AS t2 INNER JOIN (SELECT SAL, AVG(COMM) AS EXPR2 FROM (SELECT SAL, COMM FROM EMP GROUP BY SAL, COMM) AS t4 GROUP BY SAL) AS t5 ON t2.SAL IS NOT DISTINCT FROM t5.SAL INNER JOIN (SELECT SAL, SUM(SAL) AS EXPR3 FROM (SELECT SAL FROM EMP GROUP BY SAL) AS t8 GROUP BY SAL) AS t9 ON t2.SAL IS NOT DISTINCT FROM t9.SAL

original_query: SELECT * FROM EMP LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM DEPT) AS t ON EMP.DEPTNO = t.DEPTNO ORDER BY EMP.SAL FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY;
rewritten_query: SELECT * FROM EMP LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM DEPT) AS t ON EMP.DEPTNO = t.DEPTNO ORDER BY EMP.SAL LIMIT 10

original_query: SELECT EMP.SAL + BONUS.COMM, SUM(BONUS.SAL + BONUS.SAL + 100) OVER (PARTITION BY BONUS.JOB RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) FROM EMP INNER JOIN BONUS ON EMP.ENAME = BONUS.ENAME AND EMP.DEPTNO = 10
rewritten_query: SELECT EMP.SAL + BONUS.COMM, SUM(BONUS.SAL + BONUS.SAL + 100) OVER (PARTITION BY BONUS.JOB RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) FROM EMP INNER JOIN BONUS ON EMP.ENAME = BONUS.ENAME AND EMP.DEPTNO = 10

original_query: SELECT t0.SAL + t1.COMM, SUM(t1.EXPR0) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.JOB RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) FROM (SELECT ENAME, SAL, DEPTNO = 10 AS EXPR0 FROM EMP) AS t0 INNER JOIN (SELECT ENAME, JOB, COMM, SAL + SAL + 100 AS EXPR0 FROM BONUS) AS t1 ON t0.ENAME = t1.ENAME AND t0.EXPR0
rewritten_query: SELECT t0.SAL + t1.COMM, SUM(t1.EXPR0) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.JOB RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) FROM (SELECT ENAME, SAL, DEPTNO = 10 AS EXPR0 FROM EMP) AS t0 INNER JOIN (SELECT ENAME, JOB, COMM, SAL + SAL + 100 AS EXPR0 FROM BONUS) AS t1 ON t0.ENAME = t1.ENAME AND t0.EXPR0

original_query: select sum(distinct deptno), count(distinct deptno), min(deptno) from emp;
rewritten_query: SELECT SUM(DEPTNO), COUNT(DEPTNO), MIN(DEPTNO) FROM (SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO) AS t

original_query: select * from emp e1  where e1.empno > SOME (select deptno from dept);
rewritten_query: select * from emp e1  where e1.empno > SOME (select deptno from dept);

original_query: select e.mgr, d.mgr from emp as e full outer join emp as d on e.mgr = d.mgr group by d.mgr, e.mgr;
rewritten_query: SELECT EMP.MGR AS mgr, EMP0.MGR AS mgr0 FROM EMP FULL JOIN EMP AS EMP0 ON EMP.MGR = EMP0.MGR

original_query: select dname, ddeptno, c from              (select name dname, deptno ddeptno, count(*) as c              from dept group by grouping sets ((name,deptno),(name))) t               where dname = 'Charlie';
rewritten_query: SELECT NAME AS dname, DEPTNO AS ddeptno, COUNT(*) AS c FROM DEPT GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((NAME, DEPTNO), NAME) HAVING NAME = 'Charlie'

original_query: select distinct d.deptno from emp e right outer join dept d on e.deptno = d.deptno;
rewritten_query: select distinct d.deptno from emp e right outer join dept d on e.deptno = d.deptno

original_query: with e2 as (   select empno, case when true then deptno else null end as deptno   from emp) select empno,   deptno in (select deptno from e2 where empno < 20) as d from e2;
rewritten_query: SELECT t4.empno, t7.f1 IS NOT NULL AND t4.f0 <> 0 OR (t4.deptno0 IS NULL OR t4.f1 < t4.f0) AND NULL AND t4.f0 <> 0 AND t7.f1 IS NULL AS d FROM (SELECT t.empno, t.deptno, t3.f0, t3.f1, t.deptno AS deptno0 FROM (SELECT EMPNO AS empno, CAST(DEPTNO AS INTEGER) AS deptno FROM EMP) AS t, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS f0, COUNT(deptno) AS f1 FROM (SELECT EMPNO AS empno, CAST(DEPTNO AS INTEGER) AS deptno FROM EMP) AS t0 WHERE empno < 20) AS t3) AS t4 LEFT JOIN (SELECT deptno, TRUE AS f1 FROM (SELECT EMPNO AS empno, CAST(DEPTNO AS INTEGER) AS deptno FROM EMP) AS t5 WHERE empno < 20) AS t7 ON t4.deptno0 = t7.deptno

original_query: select empno, sum(sal), min(sal), max(sal),  bit_and(distinct sal), bit_or(sal), count(distinct sal),  grouping(deptno) from emp group by empno, deptno;
rewritten_query: SELECT t0.empno, t0.EXPR1, t0.EXPR2, t0.EXPR3, t0.EXPR4, t0.EXPR5, t3.EXPR6, t0.EXPR7 FROM (SELECT EMPNO AS empno, DEPTNO, SUM(SAL) AS EXPR1, MIN(SAL) AS EXPR2, MAX(SAL) AS EXPR3, BIT_AND(SAL) AS EXPR4, BIT_OR(SAL) AS EXPR5, GROUPING(DEPTNO) AS EXPR7 FROM EMP GROUP BY EMPNO, DEPTNO) AS t0 INNER JOIN (SELECT empno, DEPTNO, COUNT(SAL) AS EXPR6 FROM (SELECT EMPNO AS empno, DEPTNO, SAL FROM EMP GROUP BY EMPNO, DEPTNO, SAL) AS t2 GROUP BY empno, DEPTNO) AS t3 ON t0.empno IS NOT DISTINCT FROM t3.empno AND t0.DEPTNO IS NOT DISTINCT FROM t3.DEPTNO

original_query: select empno, count(mgr) from emp group by empno, deptno;
rewritten_query: select empno, count(mgr) from emp group by empno, deptno

original_query: select * from emp where empno > ANY (  select deptno from dept where emp.job = dept.name);
rewritten_query: select * from emp where empno > ANY (  select deptno from dept where emp.job = dept.name);

original_query: select deptno c, min(y), max(z) z, sum(r), sum(m) n, sum(x) sal from (    select deptno, ename, sum(sal) x, max(sal) z,       min(sal) y, count(hiredate) m, count(mgr) r    from emp group by deptno, ename) t group by deptno;
rewritten_query: SELECT DEPTNO, MIN(y), MAX(z) AS z, SUM(m), SUM(m) AS n, SUM(x) AS sal FROM (SELECT ENAME, DEPTNO, SUM(SAL) AS x, MAX(SAL) AS z, MIN(SAL) AS y, COUNT(*) AS m FROM EMP GROUP BY ENAME, DEPTNO) AS t GROUP BY DEPTNO

original_query: select coalesce(sum(count_comm), 0) from (   select deptno, count(comm) as count_comm   from emp   group by deptno, mgr) t;
rewritten_query: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(count_comm) IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(SUM(count_comm) AS BIGINT) ELSE 0 END FROM (SELECT MGR, DEPTNO, COUNT(*) AS count_comm FROM EMP GROUP BY MGR, DEPTNO) AS t
